text: {"claims":[{"statement":"Regular consumption of eggs could help support optimal weight management.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"regular consumption of eggs could help support optimal weight management, an important consideration given the burden of obesity and related non-communicable diseases in Western countries","entailment":"The quoted sentence states that eating eggs regularly may aid optimal weight management, directly supporting the claim.","population":"people in Western countries","intervention":"regular consumption of eggs","comparator":"","outcome":"optimal weight management","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"conditional"},{"statement":"The balance of evidence points towards eggs being nutritious, healthy and sustainable, rather than risky.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"the balance of evidence points towards eggs being nutritious, healthy and sustainable, rather than risky","entailment":"The quoted phrase summarizes the overall evidence as indicating eggs are nutritious, healthy and sustainable instead of risky, which underlies the claim.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"eggs are nutritious, healthy and sustainable","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"}]}
